source_tracking_status_bar_click_to_push: Click to push local changes to org
source_tracking_conflict_detection_disab: Conflict detection is disabled. Local and remote change tracking is not active. Enable it in settings: `salesforcedx-vscode-metadata.sourceTracking.enableConflictDetection`
push_or_deploy_on_save_enabled_descripti: Specifies whether or not to automatically deploy when a local source file is saved.
ignore_conflicts_on_push_description: Specifies whether to always use --ignore-conflicts when deploy-on-save runs
conflicts_view_welcome_message:
Files will appear when you

• run the Diff Source Against Org command on a folder 
• deploy or retrieve source that has conflicts.
conflict_detection_enabled_description: When enabled, the system will check for conflicts before deploying/retrieving.
source_tracking_polling_interval_descrip: Interval in seconds to poll for remote source tracking changes. Set to 0 to disable polling.
extension_level_notifications_descriptio: Notification style for all Metadata commands. Overrides the global salesforcedx-vscode-services.notifications setting. Individual commands can be further overridden in salesforcedx-vscode-metadata.commandLevelNotifications.
command_level_notifications_description: Notification style for each Metadata command. Overrides the global salesforcedx-vscode-services.notifications and extension-level salesforcedx-vscode-metadata.extensionLevelNotifications settings.
notifications_off_description: No success notifications. Progress spinner shown in the status bar.
notifications_status_bar_description: Show progress spinner and success message in the status bar.
notifications_toast_description: Show progress and success as toast notifications.
notifications_deploy_this_source_descrip: Notification style for SFDX: Deploy This Source to Org.
notifications_retrieve_this_source_descr: Notification style for SFDX: Retrieve This Source from Org.
notifications_push_source_description: Notification style for SFDX: Push Source to Default Org.
notifications_pull_source_description: Notification style for SFDX: Pull Source from Default Org.
notifications_deploy_source_in_manifest_: Notification style for SFDX: Deploy Source in Manifest to Org.
notifications_retrieve_source_in_manifes: Notification style for SFDX: Retrieve Source in Manifest from Org.
notifications_delete_from_project_and_or: Notification style for SFDX: Delete from Project and Org.
notifications_diff_source_description: Notification style for SFDX: Diff Source Against Org.
notifications_deploy_on_save_description: Notification style for Deploy on Save.
